data.title: Stablecoins Are Future Of Commerce, Says Base's Tom Vieira
data.description: Stablecoins are the future of commerce, according to Tom Vieira, Head of Product for Base, Coinbase's (NASDAQ:COIN) Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) Layer-2 network.

data.title: 'This Is Something That President Trump Does Over And Over Again,' Geopolitical Strategist Says About Failed Rare Minerals Deal With Ukraine President Zelenskyy
data.description: Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy met with U.S. President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance on Friday but left the White House without signing an agreement for rare minerals.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Rebound From The Brink: Here Are The Key Levels To Watch
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are rebounding from an overnight dip that saw Bitcoin go as low as $78,300.
